## Use Cases

WHEN: script writing, function design, module development, code structure, PowerShell patterns, idioms, advanced scripting, function parameters, return values, documentation.

DO NOT USE FOR: security hardening (use powershell-security), testing implementation (use powershell-testing), Azure-specific patterns (use powershell-azure), code analysis (use powershell-review).
